intro_highlights.text: Probabilistic predictions are at the heart of modern data science.
intro_highlights.why_good: 开场句把任务价值直接抬到领域核心，适合作为高密度背景句。

intro_highlights.text: We initiate the algorithmic study of calibration testing through the lens of property testing.
intro_highlights.why_good: “initiate ... through the lens of ...”是经典方法论定位句式。

intro_highlights.text: To our knowledge, we are the first to formalize the calibration testing problem.
intro_highlights.why_good: 首创性表达清晰、语气克制。

intro_highlights.text: Our first algorithmic contribution is a nearly-linear time algorithm.
intro_highlights.why_good: 贡献句直接给结果级别，避免空泛。

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 先讲校准在预测决策中的中心地位。
定义 distribution-level calibration testing。
指出现有度量和黑盒求解器效率问题。
LP到min-cost flow重写，并给复杂度优势。
待缓存抓取后补齐。

intro_highlights.text: A key and open challenge is the gap between natural language and action space.
intro_highlights.why_good: 一句话定义了该类工作的结构性难点。

intro_highlights.text: There has not been a systematic study of these designs across diverse embodiments.
intro_highlights.why_good: 研究空白表述精准，不夸张。

intro_highlights.text: For continuous action spaces ..., while for discrete actions ....
intro_highlights.why_good: 并列句式天然适合写“分场景结论”。

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 先肯定 MLLM 能力边界。
自然语言与动作空间错配。
按连续/离散动作分策略并给系统实验。

intro_highlights.text: To harness the strengths of both paradigms, we introduce FlowLLM.
intro_highlights.why_good: 桥接式表达，适合混合范式论文。

intro_highlights.text: This synergistic approach bridges discrete and continuous modeling.
intro_highlights.why_good: 总结句可直接复用到方法贡献段。

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: LLM离散优势 + RFM连续优势形成互补。
待缓存抓取后补齐。

intro_highlights.text: Existing pipelines can be roughly divided into two-stage and one-stage methods.
intro_highlights.why_good: 相关工作归类句，便于自然过渡到缺点。

intro_highlights.text: The core idea is to decompose one-to-many registration into multiple one-to-one registrations.
intro_highlights.why_good: 方法核心一句到位，适合摘要和引言复用。

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 先按pipeline类型分组。
先focus再matching。

intro_highlights.text: It is natural to ask: what is the optimal strategy in repeated interactions?
intro_highlights.why_good: 问题驱动型引言中的“核心问题句”。

intro_highlights.text: Can such an optimal strategy be computed efficiently?
intro_highlights.why_good: 将研究问题自然转化为可计算性问题。

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 多智能体现实场景引出最优策略问题。
正结果与负结果并行陈述。

intro_highlights.text: Hopfield network of associative memory is an elegant mathematical model.
intro_highlights.why_good: 经典工作定位句，语义紧凑。

intro_highlights.text: Adding new memories does not change the size of the memory tensor.
intro_highlights.why_good: 亮点句直接传达方法价值。

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 指出新增模式导致参数增长。
随机特征替代表达保持参数规模。

intro_highlights.text: There exists a trade-off between detailedness and correctness.
To address this issue, we propose a training-free framework.
intro_highlights.why_good: “to address ... we propose ...”是标准且高效的过渡句。

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 细节充分性与正确性冲突。
unleash-then-eliminate + probing降算力。

intro_highlights.text: Can we equip AI models with similar spatial intelligence?
intro_highlights.why_good: 以提问式开场建立动机。

intro_highlights.text: To facilitate this task, we curate a dataset and design new metrics.
intro_highlights.why_good: 任务论文核心贡献句式。

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 认知地图类比切入。
数据集 + 指标 + baseline。
